message:
Add cross-provider parity tests for auth errors, gRPC mapping, role translation, parallel tool calls

- OpenAI: 401 → AuthenticationError test
- Gemini: 4 new gRPC status codes (UNAUTHENTICATED, UNAVAILABLE, DEADLINE_EXCEEDED, INTERNAL)
- Gemini: Developer role merged into systemInstruction test
- Gemini: Parallel functionCall parsing test
- Anthropic: Parallel tool_use parsing test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
